meta.description: Per-item machine gate decisions for the fully-automated AIG pipeline. Acceptance is automatic: an item clearing all gates is emitted; no human sign-off anywhere (owner decision 2026-07-02; [R23] automation-bias risk accepted, compensated by aig::ungraded never feeding readiness [R24]).
meta.llm_path_note: mock backend: canned LLM drafts were run through every gate to exercise the path but are NOT emitted as content; the parameterized generators provide the shipped items
